request_text: Fix the orientation block wording in src/specify_cli/session_presence/content.py to use imperative language so AI agents reliably invoke spec-kitty do when triggered by 'hey spec kitty' and related phrases. Change the lightweight dispatch line from descriptive ('→ run spec-kitty do') to mandatory with a reason ('→ ALWAYS run spec-kitty do — do not answer directly; this loads governance context, routes to the correct agent profile, and records the Op'). Then run spec-kitty upgrade to propagate the change to all 17+ agent harnesses in this repo, and open a PR.
